Rules.InvariantScript: Collect(colEditShifts, {RowKey: Text(GUID()), Day: "Monday", ShiftStart: "8:30 AM", ShiftEnd: "9:00 AM"})

With( { st: Sort(colStaff, SchedSortOrder, SortOrder.Ascending), H: 28 }, "
" & "" & "" & "" & "" & "
" & "
" & "
" & Concat( Filter(colTimeSlots, Idx < 16) As slot, With( {nxt: Coalesce(LookUp(colTimeSlots, Idx = slot.Idx + 1).Label, "4:30 PM")}, "
" & Left(slot.Label, Find(" ", slot.Label) - 1) & "-" & Left(nxt, Find(" ", nxt) - 1) & "
" ) ) & "
" & "" & Concat( ["Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday"] As dn, With( {dayStaff: Filter(st As person, CountRows(Filter(colSchedLookup, Email = person.MemberEmail && Day = dn.Value)) > 0)}, "" ) ) & "
" & "
" & If( CountRows(dayStaff) = 0, "" & "" & "" & "
" & Upper(dn.Value) & "
No shifts
", "" & "" & "" & Concat( dayStaff As s, With( {cr: LookUp(colSchedColors, Idx = Mod(s.StaffID, 12))}, "" ) ) & "" & Concat( Filter(colTimeSlots, Idx < 16) As slot, With( {si: slot.Idx}, "" & Concat( dayStaff As s, With( { cr: LookUp(colSchedColors, Idx = Mod(s.StaffID, 12)), on: CountRows(Filter(colSchedLookup, Email = s.MemberEmail && Day = dn.Value && si >= StartSlot && si < EndSlot)) > 0 }, If(on, "", "" ) ) ) & "" ) ) & "
" & Upper(dn.Value) & "
" & Left(First(Split(Trim(s.MemberName), " ")).Value, 1) & Left(Last(Split(Trim(s.MemberName), " ")).Value, 1) & "
" ) & "
" & "
" & "
" & Concat( Filter(colTimeSlots, Idx < 16) As slot, With( {nxt: Coalesce(LookUp(colTimeSlots, Idx = slot.Idx + 1).Label, "4:30 PM")}, "
" & Left(slot.Label, Find(" ", slot.Label) - 1) & "-" & Left(nxt, Find(" ", nxt) - 1) & "
" ) ) & "
" & "
" )

With(
    {
        ord: If(varSchedTotalsSortDesc, SortOrder.Descending, SortOrder.Ascending),
        totalsRows: ForAll(
            Sort(colStaff, SchedSortOrder, SortOrder.Ascending) As p,
            With(
                {
                    mH:   Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, Email = p.MemberEmail && Day = "Monday" && StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2),
                    tuH:  Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, Email = p.MemberEmail && Day = "Tuesday" && StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2),
                    wH:   Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, Email = p.MemberEmail && Day = "Wednesday" && StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2),
                    thH:  Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, Email = p.MemberEmail && Day = "Thursday" && StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2),
                    fH:   Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, Email = p.MemberEmail && Day = "Friday" && StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2),
                    maxH: Switch(p.AidType, "Work Study", 12, "Graduate Assistant", 20, 6)
                },
                {
                    StaffID:   p.StaffID,
                    MemberName:p.MemberName,
                    MemberEmail:p.MemberEmail,
                    RoleAbbr:  Switch(p.AidType, "Work Study", "WS", "Graduate Assistant", "GA", "President's Aid", "PA", "-"),
                    MonH:      mH,
                    TueH:      tuH,
                    WedH:      wH,
                    ThuH:      thH,
                    FriH:      fH,
                    TotalH:    mH + tuH + wH + thH + fH,
                    MaxH:      maxH,
                    RowFill:   Coalesce(LookUp(colSchedColors, Idx = Mod(p.StaffID, 12)).Light, "#f5f0ea")
                }
            )
        )
    },
    Switch(
        Coalesce(varSchedTotalsSortBy, "Student"),
        "Role",  Sort(totalsRows, RoleAbbr, ord),
        "Mon",   Sort(totalsRows, MonH, ord),
        "Tue",   Sort(totalsRows, TueH, ord),
        "Wed",   Sort(totalsRows, WedH, ord),
        "Thu",   Sort(totalsRows, ThuH, ord),
        "Fri",   Sort(totalsRows, FriH, ord),
        "Total", Sort(totalsRows, TotalH, ord),
        "Max",   Sort(totalsRows, MaxH, ord),
        Sort(totalsRows, MemberName, ord)
    )
)

With(
    {v: Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, Day = "Monday" && StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2)},
    If(v = RoundDown(v, 0), Text(v, "0"), Text(v, "0.#"))
)

    {v: Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, Day = "Tuesday" && StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2)},
    If(v = RoundDown(v, 0), Text(v, "0"), Text(v, "0.#"))
)

With(
    {v: Sum(Filter(colSchedLookup, StartSlot >= 0), (EndSlot - StartSlot) / 2)},

)
